title: Cancelled subscriptions keep getting billed
body: SubscriptionService#cancel removes the subscription from the customer's active list in memory but never persists status = 'canceled' or sets canceled_at, so BillingService keeps generating invoices for subscriptions that were supposedly canceled.

title: Proration amounts are wrong for months that aren't 30 days
body: ProrationCalculator#calculate assumes every month has 30 days when computing the daily rate for a plan change, so proration amounts are wrong for 28, 29, and 31-day months.

title: Expired coupons still apply their discount
body: CouponApplier#apply discounts the invoice total whenever a coupon code matches, without checking Coupon#expires_at, so expired coupons still apply their discount.

title: Declined charges still leave the invoice marked as paid
body: BillingService#charge marks the invoice as paid right after calling the payment gateway, without inspecting the gateway response status, so declined charges still leave the invoice in a paid state.

title: Dunning retries resubmit invoices that are already paid
body: DunningService#retry_failed_invoices loads invoices for retry without filtering by status, so invoices that are already marked paid get resubmitted to the payment gateway and customers are charged twice.

title: Webhook endpoint accepts unsigned payment events
body: WebhooksController#create parses and processes incoming payment provider events without calling WebhookSignature.valid?, so anyone who can reach the endpoint can POST a forged event and trigger billing side effects.

title: Retried charge job double-charges the customer
body: ChargeInvoiceJob#perform calls BillingService#charge every time it runs without checking whether the invoice was already charged, so job retries after a transient failure end up charging the customer twice for the same invoice.
